--- DKIESQ@aol.com wrote:

Please advise.

Darren

Date: Wed, 31 May 2006 17:25:35 -0400
To: DKIESQ@aol.com
From: Peg Ugland pegu@naproperty.com
Subject: Friday

Darren,
If it is ok with Jeffrey, I would like to take
another vacation day this
Friday. Beth has an appointment in the morning, so
I need to watch Avery
for her. In the afternoon, Rich and I would like to
go to the Memorial
Golf tournament. We usually do this every year to
celebrate our
anniversary. (Monday will be our 35th!)
Please let me know.
Thanks.
Peg
